\tzpentry{ID4423}{Combo Holonomy Capacitance Functional}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4423 introduces Combo Holonomy Capacitance Functional as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} C_1(T^2) &= \frac{1}{2\pi} \int_{T^2} F_{\mu\nu}\,\mathrm{d}^2x, \\ w(T^2) &= \frac{1}{2\pi i} \oint_{\partial T^2} \mathrm{d}\log \det T_{\mathrm{pack}\to T^2}, \\ \Pi_{\pi} &= \limsup_{n\to\infty} \prod_{k=1}^{n} \left( 1 + \frac{k_{\mathrm{kiss}}(s_k)}{10^k\,d_k(\pi)} \right)^{1/n}. \end{align}
